title: manulea glandulosa
intro: Manulea glandulosa, also known as the hairy manulea, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Manulea glandulosa is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in some herbal preparations, including teas and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
